# Everlasting Hibachi

> Private hibachi chef and mobile hibachi catering for outdoor backyard parties across the Southeast United States.

## About

Everlasting Hibachi is an outdoor hibachi show and catering company bringing a private chef, hibachi grill, fresh ingredients, and live fire show directly to your home, patio, vacation rental, or outdoor venue. We serve Georgia, Tennessee, Alabama, North Carolina, and South Carolina.

## Services

- Mobile hibachi catering for private parties
- Outdoor hibachi chef at home
- Fire show included with every event
- BYOB-friendly events
- Family-style setup for all ages

## Pricing

- $55 per adult (ages 14+)
- $30 per child (ages 5–13)
- Children under 4: FREE
- $550 event minimum
- Deposit: 20–30% to secure date
- Final headcount due 5–10 days before event
- Gratuity not included

## Menu

### Included with every guest
- Side salad
- Hibachi fried rice
- Hibachi vegetables
- 2 protein choices (adults) / 1 protein choice (children)

### Proteins (2 per adult, 1 per child)
- Chicken — included
- Steak — included
- Shrimp — included
- Scallop — included
- Salmon — included
- Tofu — included
- Filet Mignon — +$5 upgrade
- Lobster Tail — +$10 upgrade

### Appetizers & Add-Ons
- Gyoza (6 pcs) — $8
- Edamame — $7
- Noodles — $5
- Extra protein order — $15
- Extra Filet Mignon — $20
- Extra Lobster Tail — $20

## Service Areas

- Georgia: Atlanta, Augusta, Savannah, Columbus, Macon, Athens, Sandy Springs, Roswell
- Tennessee: Nashville, Memphis, Knoxville, Chattanooga, Clarksville, Murfreesboro, Franklin
- Alabama: Birmingham, Huntsville, Montgomery, Mobile, Tuscaloosa, Hoover, Dothan
- North Carolina: Charlotte, Raleigh, Greensboro, Durham, Winston-Salem, Cary, Fayetteville
- South Carolina: Charleston, Columbia, Greenville, Rock Hill, Mount Pleasant, Spartanburg

## Contact

- Phone: (347) 653-8882
- Email: everlastinghibachiwithus@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.everlastinghibachi.com
